atDirectives.name: @tailwind
atDirectives.description: Use the @tailwind directive to insert Tailwind's base, components, utilities and screens styles into your CSS.

atDirectives.name: @apply
atDirectives.description: Use @apply to inline any existing utility classes into your own custom CSS.

atDirectives.name: @config
atDirectives.description: Use the @config directive to specify which config file Tailwind should use when compiling that CSS file.

atDirectives.name: @theme
atDirectives.description: Use the @theme directive to define design tokens like colors, fonts, and spacing in Tailwind CSS v4.

atDirectives.name: @source
atDirectives.description: Use the @source directive to specify additional source paths for Tailwind CSS v4 to scan for classes.

atDirectives.name: @custom-variant
atDirectives.description: Use the @custom-variant directive to define custom variants in Tailwind CSS v4.

atDirectives.name: @variant
atDirectives.description: Use the @variant directive to apply variants to a block of CSS in Tailwind CSS v4.

atDirectives.name: @plugin
atDirectives.description: Use the @plugin directive to load a Tailwind CSS plugin in v4.
